explanation: The architecture decomposes services along what appear to be valid business domain boundaries (Customers, Vets, Pets) and a specific technical capability (GenAI). Each service has its own data store, suggesting it is responsible for a complete functional area. While one could argue that some services like 'pets-service' are tightly coupled to others ('customers-service'), this separation is a common design pattern and not a definitive smell without more information on the complexity of the business logic within each service. There is no strong evidence to suggest any service has a trivially small responsibility that would justify merging it.
